display_information.name: PMKit
display_information.description: AI-powered product management assistant that connects to your Slack workspace to provide daily briefs, meeting prep, and insights.
display_information.long_description:
PMKit is an AI-powered product management toolkit that helps PMs stay on top of their work. By connecting to your Slack workspace, PMKit can:

• Generate daily briefs summarizing important conversations
• Prepare meeting packs with relevant context from team discussions
• Surface customer feedback and insights from support channels
• Track product discussions and decisions across channels

PMKit only reads messages - it never posts or modifies anything in your workspace without explicit approval through its draft system.
